notes: The game runs flawlessly, except  minor bugs (weird fonts in menu and crash when you change the video settings). I finished the game and had only one random crash during the whole game.
title: Dark Messiah of Might & Magic

notes:
game thinks it is running in 32 bit environment.  Add this to the game launch options:

PROTON_FORCE_LARGE_ADDRESS_AWARE=1 %command%
title: Dark Messiah of Might & Magic

notes: Intro cutscenes play (without video) yet are skippable with space bar. The game's splash screen then appears and it freezes.
title: Dark Messiah of Might & Magic

notes: Had to set a resolution via launch options, "-w 1920 -h 1080" Multiplayer servers are offline but you can still host a game and connect directly through the IP.
title: Dark Messiah of Might & Magic

notes: Tried various command line parameters without any effect. Screen stays black with sound of intros in background (but scratchy). Only a splash screen after intro videos and before menu is visible (still picture).
title: Dark Messiah of Might & Magic

notes: Working after I changed my desktop resolution to 1920x1080 from 4K. Previously it would get stuck at a black screen. Tried running it in windowed mode by adding "+mat_setvideomode 1920 1080 1" in launch options which allowed me to get past the black screen but caused issues with the mouse position. My final launch options: "PROTON_FORCE_LARGE_ADDRESS_AWARE=1 %command% -novid -w 1920 -h 1080"
title: Dark Messiah of Might & Magic

notes: Ran fine out of the box, but will crash when changing video settings. In game, there are occasional crashes / unrecoverable glitches (quite rare, I think I only had one) so just remember to save frequently.
title: Dark Messiah of Might & Magic

notes: Requires large address aware tweak. Resolution needs to be set using launch parameters too. After that works great. Menu UI has minor problems with font rendering. The occasional crash on load still happens as it did under windows.
title: Dark Messiah of Might & Magic
